title: Umami Dense Ethiopian Wheat Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix ethiopian dish featuring gluten-free wheat and a spicy sauce made with umami flavor for a dense and flavorful meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan, add chopped garlic and chili peppers. Sauté for about 30 seconds.
Add wheat to the pan, stir-fry for 5 minutes until golden brown on all sides.
Pour tomato sauce over the wheat, mix well to coat the grains evenly.
Stir in turmeric powder and salt. Mix again thoroughly.
Add water (2 tbsp) to the mixture, let it simmer for about 3-4 minutes or until you notice some water has been absorbed.
Once the liquid is mostly absorbed, add bay leaves, stir once more and turn off the heat.
Serve hot as a side dish with injera bread.
